top_signals.title: Russia hammers Kyiv with missiles and drones on eve of Nato summit
top_signals.summary: Zelenskyy pleads with allies to provide Patriot interceptors to defend Ukraine
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Belgian regulator flags six unauthorized crypto providers after MiCA deadline
top_signals.summary: Belgium’s FSMA warned consumers about six crypto-asset service providers it added to a fraudulent CASP list days after the EU’s MiCA transitional period expired.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Strategy sells 3,588 BTC for $216 million, with total bitcoin holdings still underwater
top_signals.summary: Strategy's total holdings account for more than 4% of the 21 million bitcoin supply cap — worth around $52.3 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Joint Statement on the EU-Türkiye High-Level Economic Dialogue
top_signals.summary: European Commission Statement Istanbul, 02 Jul 2026 The High-Level Economic Dialogue (HLED) between the European Union and Türkiye was held in İstanbul on 2 July 2026. The meeting was co-chaired by Valdis Dombrov...
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Alström Tapped to Lead Hempel
top_signals.summary: Effective 1 August 2026, Eric Alström is appointed Group President & CEO of Hempel A/S. He succeeds Michael Hansen, who resigned and left Hempel in June 2026, and joins the company following a period of interim leadership by Peter la Cour Gormsen…

top_signals.title: Bernhard Schulte Takes Delivery of Final CSOV in New Fleet Series
top_signals.summary: Bernhard Schulte Offshore (BSO) has taken delivery of Windea Clarke, the fourth and final commissioning service operation vessel (CSOV) in its latest newbuild series, with the vessel set to enter a seasonal charter on a UK North Sea offshore…
